reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM companies;

query: How many products exist in total?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM products;
SELECT name FROM companies ORDER BY name;

query: What is the average product price?
reference_sql: SELECT AVG(price) AS avg FROM products;

query: What is the most expensive product?
reference_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1;

query: How many products does each company have?
reference_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS count FROM companies c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.company_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name;

query: How many companies are in each industry?
reference_sql: SELECT industry, COUNT(*) AS count FROM companies WHERE industry IS NOT NULL GROUP BY industry ORDER BY industry;

query: List all products in the software category
reference_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE LOWER(category) = 'software' ORDER BY name;
SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price > 100 ORDER BY price DESC;

query: Show all companies along with their product names
reference_sql: SELECT c.name AS company, p.name AS product FROM companies c JOIN products p ON p.company_id = c.id ORDER BY c.name, p.name;

query: What is the most expensive product for each company?
reference_sql: SELECT c.name, MAX(p.price) AS max FROM companies c JOIN products p ON p.company_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name;

query: Which companies are headquartered in the United States?
reference_sql: SELECT name, headquarters FROM companies WHERE LOWER(headquarters) LIKE '%united states%' OR LOWER(headquarters) LIKE '%usa%' ORDER BY name;

query: What is the total value of products for each company?
reference_sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(p.price) AS sum FROM companies c JOIN products p ON p.company_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name;

query: How many queries were logged today?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM queries WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE;

query: What is the cheapest product available?
reference_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1;
